mapper.sql: QUESTION_ID, QUESTION_TYPE, QUESTION_CONTENT, QUESTION_IMAGE_BASE64, OPTION_1, OPTION_2, OPTION_3, OPTION_4, OPTION_5, OPTION_6, OPTION_7, OPTION_8, ANSWER_CONTENT, ANSWER_SOURCE, QUESTION_YEAR, QUESTION_SOURCE, CORRECT_RATE, QUESTION_STATUS, CREATED_TIME, UPDATED_TIME

q.QUESTION_ID, q.QUESTION_TYPE, q.QUESTION_CONTENT, q.QUESTION_IMAGE_BASE64, q.OPTION_1, q.OPTION_2, q.OPTION_3, q.OPTION_4, q.OPTION_5, q.OPTION_6, q.OPTION_7, q.OPTION_8, q.ANSWER_CONTENT, q.ANSWER_SOURCE, q.QUESTION_YEAR, q.QUESTION_SOURCE, q.CORRECT_RATE, q.QUESTION_STATUS, q.CREATED_TIME, q.UPDATED_TIME
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO QUESTION ( QUESTION_ID, QUESTION_TYPE, QUESTION_CONTENT, QUESTION_IMAGE_BASE64, OPTION_1, OPTION_2, OPTION_3, OPTION_4, OPTION_5, OPTION_6, OPTION_7, OPTION_8, ANSWER_CONTENT, ANSWER_SOURCE, QUESTION_YEAR, QUESTION_SOURCE, CORRECT_RATE, QUESTION_STATUS, CREATED_TIME, UPDATED_TIME ) VALUES ( #{questionId}, #{questionType}, #{questionContent}, #{questionImageBase64}, #{option1}, #{option2}, #{option3}, #{option4}, #{option5}, #{option6}, #{option7}, #{option8}, #{answerContent}, #{answerSource}, #{questionYear}, #{questionSource}, #{correctRate}, #{questionStatus}, #{createdTime}, #{updatedTime} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE QUESTION_TYPE = VALUES(QUESTION_TYPE), QUESTION_CONTENT = VALUES(QUESTION_CONTENT), QUESTION_IMAGE_BASE64 = VALUES(QUESTION_IMAGE_BASE64), OPTION_1 = VALUES(OPTION_1), OPTION_2 = VALUES(OPTION_2), OPTION_3 = VALUES(OPTION_3), OPTION_4 = VALUES(OPTION_4), OPTION_5 = VALUES(OPTION_5), OPTION_6 = VALUES(OPTION_6), OPTION_7 = VALUES(OPTION_7), OPTION_8 = VALUES(OPTION_8), ANSWER_CONTENT = VALUES(ANSWER_CONTENT), ANSWER_SOURCE = VALUES(ANSWER_SOURCE), QUESTION_YEAR = VALUES(QUESTION_YEAR), QUESTION_SOURCE = VALUES(QUESTION_SOURCE), CORRECT_RATE = VALUES(CORRECT_RATE), QUESTION_STATUS = VALUES(QUESTION_STATUS), UPDATED_TIME = VALUES(UPDATED_TIME)
mapper.select: SELECT FROM QUESTION WHERE QUESTION_ID = #{questionId} AND QUESTION_STATUS = 1 LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM QUESTION WHERE ORDER BY CREATED_TIME DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT QUESTION_TYPE FROM QUESTION WHERE QUESTION_STATUS = 1 AND QUESTION_TYPE IS NOT NULL AND QUESTION_TYPE != '' GROUP BY QUESTION_TYPE ORDER BY QUESTION_TYPE ASC
